title: Robinhood Stock Jumps Following Robust April Trading And Lending Data
text: Robinhood Markets experienced a significant stock rally following the release of strong April 2026 operating data. April 2026 Highlights: Total platform assets climbed to $345.4 billion, marking a 49% year-over-year jump. Strong net deposits of $6 billion reported in April alone. Equity Daily Average Trades (DATs) were 4 million, up 1% month-over-month and 23% year-over-year. Options DATs rose 8% sequentially and 7% year-over-year to 1.3 million. Prediction Markets: Robinhood expected April prediction market volumes to total approximately $3 billion, representing the second-best month on record. This demonstrates sustained strength in the company's newer prediction market initiative. Stock Price Movement: Shares jumped approximately 5% following the data release after the previous Q1 earnings miss had depressed the stock 13%. Year-to-Date Context: Despite the rebound, HOOD remained down approximately 32% year-to-date, reflecting concerns about Q1 weakness and broader market volatility. Catalysts Ahead: The SEC's removal of the Pattern Day Trader rule effective June 4, 2026 was expected to unlock additional trading volumes in May and June results.
